items.title: New York State halts construction of all new data centers
items.summary: New York has become the first state to temporarily halt approval of large data centers, as Gov. Kathy Hochul argues the AI-driven building boom shouldn’t come at the expense of higher electricity costs, water supplies, or local control.

items.title: Iran abused mobile networks’ vulnerabilities to locate U.S. military in the Middle East, report says
items.summary: The Iranian government exploited well-known flaws in cellphone networks to locate and then strike U.S. military personnel in the build-up and beginning of the war.

items.title: Score a 36-count extra blade kit with ECOVACS’ Goat O1000 RTK robotic mower for $699 right now ($301 off)
items.summary: We just spotted Amazon offering the ECOVACS Goat O1000 RTK Robotic Lawn Mower with Care Kit down at $698.98 shipped, which matches the price we’re seeing on the robot-only package. It’s dropping down from a full $1,000 price tag here, which we’ve usually seen discounted between $799 and $700, though there was a dip to $699 and a one-time $664 low during last month’s Prime Day event. If you missed your chance for that all-time low, you’re getting the next-best deal here with $301 savings. If you’d prefer the newer and more advanced LiDAR models, you can find the 1/2-acre A2000 LiDAR Pro at $1,498 shipped, down from $2,000, or the 3/4-acre A3000 LiDAR Pro at $1,849 shipped, down from $2,500.

items.summary:
DOCKCASE USB-C SD Card Reader

Buy for $7 (Reg. $13)

Clip the on-page 47% off coupon.

What we love

This card reader makes it easy to manage and transfer files from smartphones, cameras, and other devices that rely on removable storage. It supports both microSD and full-size SD cards, while its USB-C connection works with most modern Macs, PCs, tablets, and smartphones. This gives you a simple way to access, back up, or move photos, videos, and other files between your devices.

That combination, along with its large 2K OLED touchscreen, makes this a particularly compelling option for anyone looking for a reliable, high-performance Windows laptop, and you can learn more about it below.

To that end, the CPU is designed with space-grade survivability and is low […]

items.title: Segway officially offers the first-ever discount of $450 on its 2026 Myon e-bike packed with smart features for $1,550
items.summary: Riding right alongside the amazing Xyber e-bike and extra battery bundle deal, Segway is officially offering the very first chance at savings on its Myon Electric Bike for $1,549.99 shipped. After its debut at CES 2026, this new e-bike model hit the market immediately after in January with a $2,000 MSRP, which is where it’s kept pricewise until today. Now, you can score the very first savings of $450 that is being slashed from the tag, setting the bar for future discounts down the road.

items.title: Secure a deal on the new Splatoon Raiders before Switch 2 launch next week
items.summary:
As has been the case for several months now, the pre-order deals on the new Splatoon Raiders are very likely to disappear as soon as the game launches next week on July 23. That means you have little more than a week to secure your physical copy of the game without paying full price. There is of course a chance we see post-release deals on this one, but this is a first-part Nintendo game after all and it might be a long while before we see it selling for any less than this:

    • Matched at Amazon
  • Switch Sports Resort $50 (Reg. $60) | Walmart
  • Switch Sports Resort $50 (Reg. $60) | Amazon

  • Orbitals Nintendo Switch 2 Edition $40 (Reg. $50)
